channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 57/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 57/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 5.4%.

item.title: Bluesky · @samfr.bsky.social: No one else is at Changi airport is talking about the Streeting resignation. Disappointing.
item.description: No one else is at Changi airport is talking about the Streeting resignation. Disappointing.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Streeting resigns as health secretary and says he has lost confidence in Starmer’s leadership - UK politics live
item.description: Streeting resigns as health secretary and says he has lost confidence in Starmer’s leadership - UK politics live

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer latest: Streeting’s scathing resignation letter to PM fires starting gun on leadership race
item.description: Starmer latest: Streeting’s scathing resignation letter to PM fires starting gun on leadership race

item.title: BBC Politics: The potential challengers to Keir Starmer
item.description: The potential challengers to Keir Starmer

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Who could replace Starmer as prime minister? Here are the top contenders for a Labour leadership battle
item.description: Who could replace Starmer as prime minister? Here are the top contenders for a Labour leadership battle

item.title: BBC Politics: At a glance: Starmer fights to stay on as prime minister
item.description: At a glance: Starmer fights to stay on as prime minister

item.title: Independent UK Politics: ‘Where we need vision, we have a vacuum’: Wes Streeting’s scathing resignation letter in full
item.description: ‘Where we need vision, we have a vacuum’: Wes Streeting’s scathing resignation letter in full

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Reeves warns ‘now is not the time’ for change as rumours swirl about Labour leadership contest
item.description: Reeves warns ‘now is not the time’ for change as rumours swirl about Labour leadership contest

item.title:
Bluesky · @jessicaelgot.bsky.social: This letter from Wes Streeting reads awfully like the beginnings of an Andy Burnham deal...
"a battle of ideas, not of personalities or petty factionalism. It needs to be broad, and it needs the best possible field o...
item.description:
This letter from Wes Streeting reads awfully like the beginnings of an Andy Burnham deal...
"a battle of ideas, not of personalities or petty factionalism. It needs to be broad, and it needs the best possible field o...

item.title: FT UK Politics: NHS hospitals hit key target on waiting times in boost for Streeting
item.description: NHS hospitals hit key target on waiting times in boost for Streeting
